subject: Lasswell, a humanoid warrior figure in dark armor with a blade at his side, depicted in a Final Fantasy Brave Exvius art style
description: A humanoid male figure stands in a composed, confident pose wearing layered dark armor — primarily deep purple and dark blue — accented with brown leather straps and gold trim. The figure has long dark hair falling past the shoulders and a serious, focused expression. A sword hilt is visible at the waist. The card features a dual-image layout common to FFTCG: a full-body portrait in the foreground and a larger ghosted close-up of the face in the background, conveying intensity. The overall palette is cool blue-grey with the figure's dark armor contrasting against it.
foreground: Armored warrior with long dark hair and a sword at the hip
background: Ghosted close-up face portrait on a cool blue-grey field
